general.name: Jamf Connect Login - The Bay test
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>3AC2A82A-1886-4144-B7A1-829DF1D6B0E6</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>The Bay</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>BFDFDE4D-F08A-4DD8-B640-0697D995DBE4</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Jamf Connect Login - The Bay test</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string>Jamf Connect Login - The Bay test</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>OIDCROPGID</key><string>d6248be3-a81c-4a12-b8b3-ca959a44ae66</string><key>DenyLocalExcluded</key><array><string>saks</string><string>hbcaccnt0</string></array><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>The Bay</string><key>Migrate</key><true/><key>LocalFallback</key><true/><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>BFDFDE4D-F08A-4DD8-B640-0697D995DBE4</string><key>CreateJamfConnectPassword</key><true/><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>392536E5-DEA1-48E7-A783-4177DCF66A04</string><key>MigrateUsersHide</key><array><string>saks</string><string>hbcaccnt0</string></array><key>OIDCRedirectURI</key><string>https://127.0.0.1/jamfconnect</string><key>EnableFDE</key><true/><key>DenyLocal</key><true/><key>CreateNewUserHide</key><false/><key>OIDCProvider</key><string>Azure</string><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>AllowNetworkSelection</key><true/><key>OIDCNewPassword</key><false/><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Jamf Connect Login - The Bay test</string><key>LoginLogo</key><string>/usr/local/jamfconnect/thebayjclogo.png</string><key>OIDCUsePassthroughAuth</key><false/><key>PayloadDescription</key><string>Jamf Connect Login - The Bay test</string><key>OIDCClientID</key><string>d6248be3-a81c-4a12-b8b3-ca959a44ae66</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.jamf.connect.login</string><key>BackgroundImage</key><string>/usr/local/jamfconnect/HB_WALLPAPER.jpg</string><key>OIDCTenant</key><string>ef6f731e-41f8-43bd-9df6-8982a75c2f24</string></dict></array></dict></plist>
